project_area: Assistance for disabled individuals across multiple domains including health, housing, utilities, food, transportation, legal services, clothing, business support, and veterans/seniors programs
demographic_requirements: Must be a Rhode Island resident with a disability or meet income/resource limits for specific programs (e.g., SSI, Medicaid, SNAP). Some programs have additional criteria such as age (e.g., Medicare for 65+), veteran status, or caregiver status.
eligibility_summary: Eligibility varies by program but generally requires Rhode Island residency, proof of disability (where applicable), and meeting income/resource thresholds. Specific programs may have additional requirements such as work participation (Rhode Island Works), medical certification (TDI), or veteran status (DAV, OVS).
